hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"CLAUDE.md reminders for this project: (1) Begin your reply by announcing that CLAUDE.md was read using the exact phrase CLAUDE.md read, and address the user as Ovid from time to time. (2) NEVER modify the read-only gitignored vendored directories (ifvms.js, web-llm, zork1, zork2, zork3, scratch, vendor/glkote); read from and copy out of them only. (3) Actually read CLAUDE.md if you have not read it."}}'
